comment:
$$2\sin x\cos x-2\sin x+\cos x-1=0\\ 2\sin x(\cos x-1)+(\cos x-1)=0\\ (\cos x-1)(2\sin x+1)=0\\ \displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \cos x=1\\ \sin x=-\frac{1}{2} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=2\pi n,n\in \mathbb{Z}\\ x=-\frac{\pi }{6} +2\pi n,n\in \mathbb{Z}\\ x=-\frac{5\pi }{6} +2\pi n,n\in \mathbb{Z} \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
Ответ: \(x=2\pi n\), \(n\in \mathbb{Z}\); \(x=-\frac{\pi}{6}+2\pi n\), \(n\in \mathbb{Z}\); \(x=-\frac{5\pi}{6}+2\pi n\), \(n\in \mathbb{Z}\)
